## Question

Obtain a certified upper bound for the canonical `(M,N,p)=(16,8,1/5)` zero-communication private-team optimum, or prove a structurally justified reduction that makes exact certification feasible.

## Existing evidence

Direct clue-following has exact value `325089/390625`. Eighteen coordinate-ascent starts return that value, but this is only a lower-bound search observation. The pooled planner is an external numerical upper benchmark, not a private-team certificate.

## Completion test

Record the bound, assumptions, machine-checkable certificate, independent audit command, and affected DD-C claim IDs. Do not promote global optimality from heuristic convergence.
